Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

> go to garden

The plunkle crystal is on the floor. The ladle is on the floor. The plonkle crystal is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The spoon is on the floor. The plinkle crystal is on the floor. There are passages to a hallway and a cellar here.
> go to cellar

> take spider
You take the spider. In your inventory you have a book and a spider.

> drop bookYou drop the book. In your inventory you have a spider.
> take green beetle
I don't know what you mean.
> take green beetle
Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
> drop book
You drop the book on the floor.
